growth_records.lvlwhy: species-level trait compilation (Madin) — no strain recorded in source
growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: engqvist.
growth_records.notes: Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

up.method: model median flux, flux sampling DMM (Table 2); NOT measured

growth_records.cite: Carolina A. Contador et al. Use of genome-scale models to get new insights into the marine actinomycete genus Salinispora. BMC Systems Biology (2019). DOI:10.1186/s12918-019-0683-1. [PMC6341766]
growth_records.method: experimentally observed growth in DMM; numeric mu not reported in main text
growth_records.snippet: Median flux values... Glucose -0.97725... Ammonium -3.8176... Oxygen -3.8943 (SA-CNH643).
growth_records.notes: Model (flux-sampling) uptake fluxes under DMM, is_experimental=false. Growth in DMM confirmed in vitro; no numeric mu in main text. SA-CNH643 shows lower sulfate demand than ST (0.010 vs 0.384) per model.

phenotypes.base_medium: Sole-substrate growth / assimilation on a defined minimal medium (substrate as C/N/energy source) — positive = the organism grows on it
phenotypes.citation: BacDive strain 8027 (Reimer LC et al., BacDive 2022, NAR); https://bacdive.dsmz.de/strain/8027
